mapper.select:
select id,user_id,code,name,contact_name,contact_phone,email,address, license_no,file_round,status,submit_time,review_time,review_user_id, review_note,remark,create_time,update_time,deleted from supplier where deleted = 0
and code like concat('%',#{q.code},'%')
and name like concat('%',#{q.name},'%')
and q.contactName like concat('%',#{q.contactName},'%')
and q.contactPhone like concat('%',#{q.contactPhone},'%')
and status = #{q.status}
